body.title: [sprint] Consequence check: DickSimnel dispatch model redesign
body.intention: I intend to observe whether the dispatch model switch introduces any silent regressions in ticket flow.
body.description:
**What changed:** DickSimnel's dispatch model switched from cc_queue polling to Granny bus dispatch envelopes on dicksimnel.0; Granny config flipped from set_worker to bus.

**Predicted unintended effects:**
1. ACK timing: DickSimnel must send dispatch_ack within DISPATCH_ACK_TIMEOUT_S (180s) or Granny auto-escalates to CC. If DickSimnel's listener has startup lag or the IMAP connection is slow, early tickets could escalate before being worked.
2. Silent listener crash: If DickSimnelWorkerListener's poll thread crashes, Granny dispatches into a void — tickets sit in 'dispatched' forever (until _escalate_stale_dispatched fires). Unlike the old polling model, there's no cc_queue.next activity to indicate the device is alive.
3. OR floor decline needs bus reply: Old model — balance low → return silently, ticket stays in queue. New model — balance low → ticket already in 'dispatched' status. Must send an explicit decline reply or ticket stalls until timeout.
4. Deploy-order race: If Granny is flipped to bus dispatch (T-dicksimnel-granny-dispatch-wire) while the old DickSimnel process is still running (not yet restarted with new listener), dispatches go to void.

**Signals to watch:** Any DickSimnel tickets stuck in 'dispatched' > 3 minutes; any auto-escalations from _escalate_stale_dispatched; DickSimnel logs showing poll thread alive between jobs (no cc_queue.next calls).

**Gate condition:** Check by 2026-06-20 after both tickets ship.

**Worst-case token spend:**
  - Per-failure cost: 0 inference tokens per void dispatch (Granny escalates after 180s timeout without invoking inference; the escalated ticket goes to CC which uses Anthropic tokens to re-triage)
  - Hard cap: DISPATCH_ACK_TIMEOUT_S=180 per ticket is the per-failure bound; no iteration loop risk
  - Blast radius: if listener crashes entirely, all DickSimnel tickets auto-escalate to CC; CC re-triages them; no runaway loop since Granny's one-at-a-time per worker guard prevents re-dispatch until prior ticket clears

**Affected files:** None — observation and verification only
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Observe predicted effects; annotate outcome as occurred / clear / partial and close
**Completion criteria:** no automated verification — observation ticket; done when predicted effects are annotated as occurred / clear / partial and ticket is closed
